validation.rosterLimit: Limit exceeded: you have used {current} of a maximum of {limit} {unit}.
validation.forceSelectorMin: Mandatory selection "{entryName}" is missing in {forceName} (at least {count} required).
validation.forceRosterLimit: {forceName} requires a points limit of at least {limit} (currently: {current}).
validation.categoryMin_one: At least {count} selection required for "{categoryName}" in {forceName} (currently: {current}).
validation.categoryMin_other: At least {count} selections required for "{categoryName}" in {forceName} (currently: {current}).
validation.categoryMax_one: At most {count} selection allowed for "{categoryName}" in {forceName} (currently: {current}).
validation.categoryMax_other: At most {count} selections allowed for "{categoryName}" in {forceName} (currently: {current}).
validation.unresolvedEntry: Selection "{selectionName}" refers to an entry that no longer exists in the catalog.
validation.entryPercentMin: Option "{selectionName}" must make up at least {percent}% of the {unit} ({threshold}), but is {actual}.
validation.entryPercentMax: Option "{selectionName}" may make up at most {percent}% of the {unit} ({threshold}), but is {actual}.
validation.groupCountMax_one: Category "{groupName}" allows at most {count} selection (currently: {current} for {selectionName}).
validation.groupCountMax_other: Category "{groupName}" allows at most {count} selections (currently: {current} for {selectionName}).
validation.groupCountMin_one: Category "{groupName}" requires at least {count} selection (currently: {current} for {selectionName}).
validation.groupCountMin_other: Category "{groupName}" requires at least {count} selections (currently: {current} for {selectionName}).
validation.groupPercentMin: Category "{groupName}" must make up at least {percent}% of the {unit} ({threshold}), but is {actual}.
validation.groupPercentMax: Category "{groupName}" may make up at most {percent}% of the {unit} ({threshold}), but is {actual}.
